summary.title: OpenEMR Threat Model
summary.description: Level 1 Data Flow Diagram for OpenEMR Electronic Medical Records System. Created for Software Security course analysis.

diagrams.title: OpenEMR Level 1 DFD
diagrams.placeholder: OpenEMR Level 1 DFD - Auth, Registration, Clinical, Billing, Portal, Reporting

data.name: TB-1: Internet Boundary
data.description: Separates untrusted external users (patients, staff) from the OpenEMR application. All flows crossing this boundary are over the public internet via HTTPS.

data.name: TB-2: Application / Database Boundary
data.description: Separates the PHP application tier from the MySQL database tier. Flows crossing this boundary are SQL queries and responses.

data.name: TB-3: External Services Boundary
data.description: Separates OpenEMR from third-party external services: labs (HL7), pharmacies (eRx), insurers (EDI), payment processors, and external health systems (FHIR).

data.name: TB-4: Patient Portal Sub-Boundary
data.description: Separates the patient-facing portal (P5) from the staff application. Portal sessions have reduced privileges and separate session management.

data.name: Patient
data.description: End user accessing the patient portal. Submits demographics, views lab results and billing, sends secure messages, makes payments, and submits questionnaires.

data.name: Provider / Staff
data.description: Clinicians and administrative staff using the full OpenEMR web UI. Documents clinical encounters, manages orders and prescriptions, handles billing and scheduling.

data.name: Laboratory
data.description: External laboratory (e.g., LabCorp, Quest). Receives HL7 ORM lab orders from OpenEMR and returns HL7 ORU result messages.

data.name: Pharmacy
data.description: External pharmacy system. Receives electronic prescriptions (eRx via SOAP/XML). Returns prescription status and formulary data via WENO module.

data.name: Insurance Company
data.description: Health insurance payer. Receives EDI X12 837 claims and eligibility requests (270). Returns ERA/EOB responses and eligibility results (271).

data.name: Payment Processor
data.description: Third-party payment gateway (Stripe, AuthorizeNet). Processes credit card payments from patients via the portal or front desk.

data.name: External Health System
data.description: Other healthcare organizations. Exchanges FHIR R4 resources, CCDA documents, Direct messages, and QRDA quality reports with OpenEMR.

data.name: P1: Authentication & Access Control
data.description: Handles all login flows: username/password, MFA (TOTP), Google SSO, and OAuth2/SMART on FHIR. Validates credentials against hashed passwords (users_secure). Loads GACL role-based permissions. Issues session cookies or OAuth2 JWTs.

data.name: P2: Patient Registration & Scheduling
data.description: Captures and manages patient demographics and insurance. Handles appointment scheduling, patient check-in, and patient flow tracking (patient_tracker). Supports patient self-registration via the portal.

data.name: P3: Clinical Encounter & Order Management
data.description: Core clinical workflow: creates encounters, records SOAP notes, vitals, diagnoses, problem lists. Sends HL7 ORM lab orders, receives HL7 ORU results, sends eRx prescriptions, exports CCDA/FHIR R4 resources.

data.name: P4: Billing & Claims Processing
data.description: Converts encounter data into billing entries. Generates and submits EDI X12 837 claims. Receives and reconciles ERA/EOB responses. Processes patient payments through payment gateways. Manages accounts receivable.

data.name: P5: Patient Portal & Communication
data.description: Patient-facing portal for secure messaging, document access, lab result viewing, appointment requests, questionnaire submission, and online bill payment. Handles provider-to-patient communications.

data.name: P6: Reporting, Audit & Quality Measures
data.description: Generates clinical, financial, and operational reports. Computes Clinical Quality Measures (CQM) and exports QRDA XML for CMS. Provides HIPAA-compliant audit trail and chart access tracking.

data.name: DS-1: User & Session Store
data.description: Tables: users, users_secure, session_tracker, gacl_*, login_mfa_registrations, api_token, oauth_clients. Stores hashed credentials, active sessions, GACL roles, MFA registrations, OAuth2 tokens.

data.name: DS-2: Patient Record Store
data.description: Tables: patient_data, patient_history, form_encounter, openemr_postcalendar_events, patient_tracker. Stores patient demographics, medical history, encounter metadata, appointments, check-in status.

data.name: DS-3: Clinical Data Store
data.description: Tables: lists, immunizations, prescriptions, procedure_order, procedure_report, procedure_result, form_soap, form_vitals. Stores diagnoses, medications, lab orders and results, SOAP notes, vitals.

data.name: DS-4: Billing & Insurance Store
data.description: Tables: billing, claims, payments, insurance_data, ar_session, ar_activity, fee_schedule. Stores billing entries, submitted claims, insurance details, payment records, accounts receivable.

data.name: DS-5: Audit & Log Store
data.description: Tables: audit_master, audit_details, log, extended_log, api_log, chart_tracker. Stores all system audit events for HIPAA compliance and forensic review.

data.name: DS-6: Messaging & Document Store
data.description: Tables: onsite_messages, onsite_mail, documents, pnotes, direct_message_log, email_queue. Stores patient portal messages, internal staff messages, uploaded documents, email queue.

data.name: Credentials + MFA token
data.description: Staff submits username, password, and optional MFA token over HTTPS. Crosses TB-1.

data.name: Portal login credentials
data.description: Patient submits portal username and password over HTTPS. Crosses TB-1 and TB-4.

data.name: OAuth2 / SMART token request
data.description: External health system submits OAuth2 authorization code and SMART on FHIR scope request. Crosses TB-1 and TB-3.

data.name: Credential lookup
data.description: P1 queries users_secure for hashed password and gacl tables for role-based permissions. Crosses TB-2.

data.name: User record + ACL roles
data.description: Database returns hashed password, user record, and GACL role permissions to P1. Crosses TB-2.

data.name: Auth event log
data.description: P1 writes login success or failure event to audit_master with timestamp, IP, and user ID. Crosses TB-2.

data.name: Patient demographics + insurance
data.description: Staff submits new or updated patient demographics, insurance details, and appointment requests. Crosses TB-1.

data.name: Self-registration via portal
data.description: Patient submits self-registration data and appointment requests through the portal. Crosses TB-1 and TB-4.

data.name: Write patient record
data.description: P2 writes patient record to patient_data, patient_history, and appointment data to openemr_postcalendar_events. Crosses TB-2.

data.name: Write insurance details
data.description: P2 writes insurance_data and insurance_numbers records for the patient. Crosses TB-2.

data.name: SOAP notes / vitals / orders
data.description: Provider submits clinical encounter data: SOAP notes, vitals, ICD diagnoses, lab orders, and medication orders. Crosses TB-1.

data.name: Read patient record
data.description: P3 reads patient demographics and encounter history from DS-2. Crosses TB-2.

data.name: Write clinical data
data.description: P3 writes encounter, diagnoses, medications, lab orders, and clinical form data to DS-3. Crosses TB-2.

data.name: HL7 lab order (ORM)
data.description: P3 sends an HL7 ORM message to the external lab containing patient demographics and test codes. Crosses TB-3.

data.name: HL7 lab results (ORU)
data.description: External lab sends HL7 ORU result message to P3 which parses and writes to DS-3. Crosses TB-3. High risk: external file parsed into DB.

data.name: Electronic prescription (eRx)
data.description: P3 sends an electronic prescription to the pharmacy via SOAP/XML. Contains patient and medication details. Crosses TB-3.

data.name: CCDA / FHIR export
data.description: P3 exports clinical data as a CCDA document or FHIR R4 resources. Contains PHI. Crosses TB-3.

data.name: Clinical event log
data.description: P3 writes encounter creation, order placement, and result receipt events to DS-5. Crosses TB-2.

data.name: Procedure codes + approval
data.description: Billing staff submits CPT/HCPCS procedure codes and approves fee amounts for claim generation. Crosses TB-1.

data.name: Read diagnosis + procedure codes
data.description: P4 reads ICD diagnosis codes and procedure records from DS-3 to build billing entries. Crosses TB-2.

data.name: Write billing entries + claims
data.description: P4 writes billing entries and claim records to DS-4. Updates AR ledger. Crosses TB-2.

data.name: EDI X12 837 claim
data.description: P4 submits EDI X12 837 claim batch to insurer. Contains PHI. Crosses TB-3.

data.name: ERA / EOB response
data.description: Insurer returns ERA/EOB. P4 parses file to reconcile payments. Crosses TB-3. High risk: external file parsed into DB.

data.name: Payment request
data.description: P4 sends payment request with card and amount data to payment processor. PCI-DSS scope. Crosses TB-3.

data.name: Payment confirmation
data.description: Payment processor returns confirmation or failure. P4 updates payments table and AR records in DS-4.

data.name: Billing event log
data.description: P4 writes billing and payment events to DS-5. Crosses TB-2.

data.name: Messages / docs / questionnaire
data.description: Patient sends secure messages, uploads documents, submits questionnaires, makes payments, requests appointments. Crosses TB-1 and TB-4.

data.name: Write messages + documents
data.description: P5 writes portal messages to onsite_messages and documents to documents table. Crosses TB-2.

label.text: Read lab results for patient view

data.name: Read lab results for patient view
data.description: P5 reads procedure_result and prescription data from DS-3 to display in the portal. Crosses TB-2.

data.name: Read / write billing balance
data.description: P5 reads outstanding balance from DS-4 and writes patient payment record after portal payment. Crosses TB-2.

data.name: Portal payment request
data.description: P5 sends online bill payment request to payment processor. PCI-DSS scope. Crosses TB-3 and TB-4.

data.name: Report request
data.description: Provider or administrator requests a clinical, financial, or quality measure report. Crosses TB-1.

data.name: Read audit log
data.description: P6 reads audit_master and audit_details from DS-5 for HIPAA compliance reports. Crosses TB-2.

data.name: QRDA quality report (CMS)
data.description: P6 exports QRDA XML with Clinical Quality Measure data. Bulk PHI export. Crosses TB-3.
